signals: Team productivity expectations rising due to AI tooling
Need to define acceptable AI use in development workflows
More ambiguity in evaluating engineer performance

workflow_change.before: Focused on delivery planning, people management, cross-team coordination, and engineering execution quality.
workflow_change.after: Still manages delivery, but now also sets norms for AI tool usage, reviews changed team workflows, and rethinks performance expectations.

actions: Spent more time coaching around judgment and validation

outcome.early_effect: Manager role remains important, but success depends more on governance and judgment calibration than before.

narrative.summary: AI has changed engineering management by making workflow governance and expectation-setting more important than straightforward output tracking.
